overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following a character with a glowing red umbrella through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The journey progresses from an open downtown street with digital billboards, beneath a highway overpass into darker artificial lighting, and finally into a narrow urban corridor lined with road-closed construction signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown sidewalk with large digital billboards

events.description: pedestrian with glowing green umbrella passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking view
approaching the entrance to the highway overpass, buildings become closer

agents.ego_description: character with red umbrella and glowing red spinal implant walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and glowing green umbrella walking past the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying purple and white graphics on building facade
massive concrete structure spanning across the street ahead with vehicles passing overhead
sleek futuristic cars with headlights on, driving on the wet multi-lane road
tall buildings with illuminated windows and corporate signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked downtown sidewalk at night, following a character with a glowing red umbrella past large digital billboards. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from surrounding skyscrapers as futuristic vehicles drive by on the right. A pedestrian with a green glowing umbrella passes by closely on the left as the character approaches a highway overpass in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath highway overpass with concrete pillars

events.description: entering the shadow of the highway overpass, ambient light drops significantly to artificial tunnel lighting
navigating between concrete support pillars with slight directional adjustments

agents.ego_description: continuing forward beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians while staying close to the left wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella standing near the concrete wall

entered.detail: underside of the elevated highway showing the road structure and drainage above
massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the highway deck overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowy space beneath the highway overpass where the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Massive concrete support pillars line the path as artificial lights illuminate the misty air. The sound of traffic overhead continues as the character navigates between the pillars, with other pedestrians visible ahead in the dim tunnel-like space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian corridor between modern buildings with construction barriers

events.description: exiting underpass into narrow corridor with illuminated ROAD CLOSED construction signs on the left
entering the most confined section of the walkway with reflective glass building facade on the left and a child walking ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor, following a small child and adult pedestrian ahead while passing construction barriers

notable_agents.action: small child in dark clothing walking ahead of the ego character in the narrow passage

entered.detail: multiple illuminated red and white ROAD CLOSED signs mounted on construction barriers
modern building with dark reflective glass windows and warm interior lighting visible
temporary metal barriers with yellow and black stripes lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene transitions to a narrow urban corridor flanked by construction barriers with bright ROAD CLOSED signs. A modern glass building with illuminated interiors rises on the left while the path becomes more confined. The character follows a small child and an adult pedestrian through the misty corridor, with the artificial lighting creating a moody, enclosed atmosphere distinct from the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit downtown sidewalk into the oppressive shadows of a highway underpass. It begins by trailing a character with a glowing red umbrella past towering digital billboards, where the rain-soaked concrete reflects the brilliant lights of skyscrapers and passing futuristic vehicles. As the camera moves forward, a pedestrian with a green glowing umbrella passes by on the left, guiding the perspective toward a looming concrete structure in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character enters the enclosed space beneath the overpass, where the open city skyline is replaced by massive support pillars and a dim, misty atmosphere. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly dark and tunnel-like, with artificial lights cutting through the haze as the character navigates between the pillars toward other distant pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the environment shifts from the openness of a highway overpass into a confined, moody urban corridor. It begins by exiting the overpass, where the wide perspective narrows into a passage flanked by construction barriers and bright road closed signs. As the camera advances, the space becomes increasingly enclosed, with a modern glass building and its illuminated interiors rising sharply on the left. The scene then follows a small child and an adult pedestrian deeper into the misty corridor, where the artificial lighting intensifies the sense of isolation before the path tightens further.
